scheme_name: Cash Incentive to Wards of ESM (Academic Scholarship)
page_title: Cash Incentive to Wards of ESM (Academic Scholarship)

details: "Cash Incentive to Wards of ESM (Academic Scholarship)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, the academically meritorious wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM pursuing higher education are provided cash incentive of ₹1,000 per month. The application should be submitted within three months from the date of publication of the result of the respective exam.
eligibility: The applicant should be a Ward of an ESM / Ward of the Widow of an ESM.
The applicant should be registered with the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry.
The applicant should have scored 95% in Class 11th/12th.
The applicant should have scored 90% in the semester/annual exam of a non-professional course (80% in the case of professional course).
The applicant should not be in receipt of any other academic scholarship.

offline: The interested applicant should take print of the
of the application form for the concerned scheme.

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).

The interested applicant should submit the duly filled and signed application form and the documents to the concerned authority at the Rajya Sainik Board, Jawan Bhawan, Department of Sainik Welfare, Government of Puducherry, 261, Lawspet Main Road, Pakkamudianpet, Puducherry Road, Lawspet, Puducherry - 605013, India.
A receipt of the application will be assigned to the applicant by the concerned authority.
Address: 261, Lawspet Main Road, Pakkamudianpet, Puducherry Road, Lawspet, Puducherry - 605013, India
Hours: Monday - Friday, 2:30 pm to 5:00 pm

documents_required: Identity Card of the ESM / Widow of the ESM.
Birth Certificate of the Ward (if not already registered with the DSW).
Study Certificate of the Ward (if not already registered with the DSW).

faqs.question: Which Department of the UT of Puducherry administers this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is administered by the Department of Sainik Welfare, Union Territory of Puducherry.

faqs.question: Where can I find the URL of the Official Website of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry?
faqs.answer: The URL of the Official Website of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry is: https://sainik.py.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Where can I find the contact details of the Public Information Officer?
faqs.answer: Public Information Officer: Shri. Sandirakumaran.S, Director, Department of Sainik Welfare, 261, Pakkamudiyanpet, Lawspet, Puducherry - 605 008, +91-413-2250575 / +91-413-2253107, dirdsw.pon@nic.in, sainik.pon@nic.in

faqs.question: Where can I find the contact details of the Appellate Authority?
faqs.answer: Appellate Authority: Shri. S.D. Sundaresan, I.A.S., Secretary to Govt. (Sainik Welfare), Chief Secretariat, Puducherry - 605001, 0413-2349712, jshome.pon@nic.in

faqs.question: Are Short Service/Emergency commissioned Officers eligible for the status of ex-servicemen?
faqs.answer: Yes, if released on completion of the specific period of engagement and were given gratuity at the time of release.

faqs.question: What is the procedure for seeking information through "Right To Information (RTI)"?
faqs.answer: The required information may be asked through an application along with IPO/DD for a sum of ₹10/- in favour of the Director, Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. For more details, visit: https://sainik.py.gov.in/right-to-information.

faqs.question: What is the definition of "Ex-Servicemen" for the purpose of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The definition of "Ex-Servicemen" can be accessed through the following URL: https://sainik.py.gov.in/definition-ex-servicemen

faqs.question: Where can I find detailed guidelines for the welfare schemes provided by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare?
faqs.answer: For detailed guidelines, you can refer to the official document available at the following URL: https://sainik.py.gov.in/assistance-affd-fund.

faqs.question: Where can I get the application forms for the welfare schemes provided by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare?
faqs.answer: The application forms can be accessed through the following URL: https://sainik.py.gov.in/application-forms.

faqs.question: Is there any relaxation in the income criteria for eligibility under certain circumstances?
faqs.answer: There is no income-related eligibility criteria for this scheme.

faqs.question: Is There Any Compensation For The Delay In The Disbursal Of The Scheme Benefits?
faqs.answer: The guidelines do not mention any provision for compensation in the event of delayed disbursement of scheme benefits. Applicants should note that compensation for delays is not part of the scheme's framework.

faqs.question: How can I contact the Department of Sainik Welfare, Government of Puducherry for grievance redressal/ general queries?
faqs.answer: You contact the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry at (+91)(0413) 2253107, dirdsw.pon@nic.in, Monday to Friday, between 02:30 PM to 05:00 PM.
